heading: Notice to Congress of certain transfers of defense articles and defense services
label: 3095 Notice to Congress of certain transfers of defense articles and defense services

children.text: The transfer of a defense article or defense service, or the anticipated transfer in any fiscal year of any aggregation of defense articles or defense services, exceeding $1,000,000 in value by an intelligence agency to a recipient outside that agency shall be considered a significant anticipated intelligence activity for the purpose of this subchapter.

children.label: A
children.text: the transfer is being made to a department, agency, or other entity of the United States (so long as there will not be a subsequent retransfer of the defense articles or defense services outside the United States Government in conjunction with an intelligence or intelligence-related activity); or

children.label: i
children.text: is being made pursuant to authorities contained in part II of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 [ et seq.], the Arms Export Control Act [ et seq.], title 10 (including a law enacted pursuant to ), or chapters 1 to 11 of title 40 and division C (except sections 3302, 3307(e), 3501(b), 3509, 3906, 4710, and 4711) of subtitle I of title 41, and22 U.S.C. 230122 U.S.C. 2751section 8677(a) of title 10

children.label: ii
children.text: is not being made in conjunction with an intelligence or intelligence-related activity.

An intelligence agency may not transfer any defense articles or defense services outside the agency in conjunction with any intelligence or intelligence-related activity for which funds were denied by the Congress.
the term “intelligence agency” means any department, agency, or other entity of the United States involved in intelligence or intelligence-related activities;
the terms “defense articles” and “defense services” mean the items on the United States Munitions List pursuant to section 38 of the Arms Export Control Act [] (22 CFR part 121);22 U.S.C. 2778

children.label: A
children.text: in the case of defense articles, the transfer of possession of those articles; and

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of defense services, the provision of those services; and

children.label: i
children.text: the original acquisition cost to the United States Government, plus the cost of improvements or other modifications made by or on behalf of the Government; or

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of defense services, the full cost to the Government of providing the services.
